channel.title: GlobalSentry Climate & Disaster Feed
channel.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: India records 52.3°C in Rajasthan — deadliest April heatwave kills 238 in 72 hours
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: European heat dome shatters records: Paris hits 46°C; Seville declares 'extreme danger'
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Pakistan's Jacobabad records wet-bulb temperature of 35°C — beyond human survivability threshold
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: US Southwest megadrought enters 27th year; Lake Mead drops below dead pool elevation
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Heat stress kills 1,400 in Japan as air conditioning demand causes rolling blackouts
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Catastrophic flooding in Libya — Derna dam collapse kills estimated 11,000 people
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Bangladesh experiences worst monsoon flooding in 40 years; 7.2 million displaced
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Germany's Rhine Valley floods cause €8.5 billion in damages; 200+ missing
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Nigeria's Benue river overflows displacing 2.4 million in worst flooding since records began
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: China's Henan province hit by 'once in 1,000 years' rainfall — Zhengzhou subway flooded
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Category 5 Hurricane Elena makes landfall in Veracruz — 185 mph winds devastate coast
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Cyclone Freddy breaks record as longest-lasting tropical storm at 36 days
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Super Typhoon Mawar causes $12 billion damage across Philippines and Taiwan
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Atlantic hurricane season forecast: NOAA predicts 22 named storms — highest ever projected
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Tropical Cyclone Mocha devastates Myanmar's Rakhine state — 400,000 in need of aid
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Canada's record wildfire season burns 18.4 million hectares — smoke blankets US East Coast
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Greece's largest-ever wildfire burns through Alexandroupolis — EU activates civil protection
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Hawaiian wildfires destroy historic Lahaina town — death toll rises to 115
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Chilean wildfires kill 131 in Valparaíso region; arson suspected in 40% of ignitions
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Australia's Black Summer 2.0: Victoria declares state of disaster as fires merge
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Tuvalu formally requests climate refugee status for entire population of 11,000
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Sea level rise accelerates to 4.5mm/year — Venice activates MOSE barriers 187 times this year
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Jakarta's land subsidence crisis worsens — city sinking 25cm/year in northern districts
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Marshall Islands declares coastal emergency as king tides breach freshwater aquifers
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Miami Beach reports 200+ tidal flooding days in 2026 — highest on record
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Horn of Africa drought enters 5th consecutive failed rainy season — 23 million food insecure
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Amazon River hits record low water levels — river dolphins dying in unprecedented numbers
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Cape Town's Day Zero returns: dam levels at 13.5% as population grows beyond planning capacity
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Euphrates River flow drops 40% as Turkey, Syria, Iraq dispute upstream dam operations
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Groundwater depletion in India's Punjab threatens collapse of wheat production by 2030
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Antarctic sea ice hits record low — 1.9 million km² below 1981-2010 average
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Swiss Alps lose 10% of remaining glacier volume in single year — unprecedented retreat
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Greenland ice sheet melt contributes 1.2mm to global sea level in July alone
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Himalayan glacial lake outburst flood destroys bridge and 40 homes in Sikkim, India
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Arctic permafrost thaw releases methane at 3x predicted rates — climate models need revision
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Great Barrier Reef suffers 4th mass bleaching in 7 years as ocean temps hit record
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Amazon deforestation rate surges 22% — tipping point threshold increasingly likely
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Insect population decline reaches 45% in temperate regions — pollination crisis imminent
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: UN warns 1 million species face extinction — current rate 1,000x natural background
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Coral reefs in Caribbean experience unprecedented bleaching across all depths
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: WMO confirms 2026 as hottest year on record — 1.8°C above pre-industrial baseline
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Compound climate event: drought-wildfire-flood cascade hits California in 90-day window
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Climate attribution study links Pakistan floods to 30x increase from global warming
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: El Niño-Southern Oscillation reaches 'super' threshold — global food prices spike 35%
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: IPCC special report warns of simultaneous breadbasket failures within next decade
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Texas power grid collapses again during extreme cold — 4.5 million without electricity
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: European rail network forced to reduce speeds by 30% as heat warps tracks across continent
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Mumbai's coastal road project threatened by accelerating erosion and storm surge
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Water rationing imposed in Barcelona, Bogotá, and Bengaluru simultaneously
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.

item.title: Bridge collapses in Brazil during flash flood — 14 vehicles swept into river
item.description: Real-time monitoring of climate disasters, extreme weather, and environmental threats.
